context_units.diff_patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+import secrets
+
+
+def generate_token(num_bytes: int = 32) -> str:
+    """Return a URL-safe random token."""
+    return secrets.token_urlsafe(num_bytes)
+
+
+def unique_sorted(items: list[int]) -> list[int]:
+    """Return the unique values of items in ascending order."""
+    return sorted(set(items))

raw_diff_chunks.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+import secrets
+
+
+def generate_token(num_bytes: int = 32) -> str:
+    """Return a URL-safe random token."""
+    return secrets.token_urlsafe(num_bytes)
+
+
+def unique_sorted(items: list[int]) -> list[int]:
+    """Return the unique values of items in ascending order."""
+    return sorted(set(items))
